title: Fog Looks Modern Now
description: Helps fog look better by moving the fog start closer. Additionally, adds cave fog and biome specific fog density. Forge 1.20+ port of Fog Looks Good Now
body:
# Fog Looks Modern Now
This is a 1.20+ port of Fog Looks Good Now, the original Forge version can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fog-looks-good-now). Modern Fabric port [is also available](https://modrinth.com/mod/fog-looks-good-now-fabric)


Fog Looks Good Now creates a greater sense of depth and atmosphere in Minecraft by shifting the fog start forward, maintaining the same view distance while greatly improving the visuals of the game.

In addition to this, the mod adds:

* Configurable fog start and fog end.
* Configurable cave fog start.
* Configurable cave fog color.
* ~~Configurable weather-related fog (rain, thunder etc.)~~ - To be done
# Configuration
You can access the configuration either directly through the TOML file or through Config screen if [Forge Config Screens](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-screens) is installed
# Screenshots

![DistantLandscape](https://i.imgur.com/JxtP1UD.png)
